name: chain_acquisition_launch_hn_sitefire_yc_w2
method: [ACQUISITION] Launch HN: Sitefire (YC W26) – Automating actions to improve AI visibility

stages.task: Pull Perplexity + DuckDuckGo AI answers for 20 target business-category queries using requests (free, no API key needed)
Score each business on AI citation gap — how often does their site appear vs competitors? High gap = high-value prospect
Generate 1-page GEO audit PDF/HTML per prospect using claude -p (free, Claude Max) — shows missed citations, competitor dominance, fix recommendations
Cold email each qualified prospect with audit report attached. Hook: 'Your brand is invisible to AI — here's proof' → book call → EAS service upsell
